response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist software engineer with broad experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the role specifically requires a senior C++ developer with deep expertise in STL, multi-threaded systems, message brokers, MQTT/REST IoT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity. The resume shows only a brief 7-month stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments back in 2014-2015, with no evidence of recent C++ work, industrial automation experience, or IEC 62443/SDL exposure. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not match the core requirements.
strengths: 12+ years of software engineering experience with strong fundamentals and TDD/craftsmanship mindset
Distributed systems and low-latency backend experience (Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec)
Demonstrated mentoring, workshops, and technical communication skills
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (only ~7 months in 2014-2015); no recent hands-on C++/STL work
No industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, or IoT/MQTT protocol experience evident
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850/104, DNP 3.0) or Azure cloud

key_factors.factor: No industrial automation / IEC 62443 / SDL background
Strong general engineering and distributed-systems track record
